عون: the One Whose help is sought
ذهب: He would certainly have taken away
موت: He will cause you to die
عدد: then prescribed number (should be made up)
بشر: and a bearer of glad tidings
قرب: the ones who are near (to Allah)
قرر: so (there is) a place of dwelling
وفي: And will be paid in full
قلل: and He made you (appear) as few
بلو: And surely We will test you
so that He may test you
عجل: And they ask you to hasten
سقي: and they will be given to drink
They will be given to drink
and he will be made to drink
and We gave it to you to drink
فجر: And We caused to gush forth
شرب: And they were made to drink
طمع: lest should be moved with desire
حجج: so that they argue with you
مني: and surely arouse desires in them
أثم: But sin of both of them
عمر: he could be granted a life
نبذ: surely he would have been thrown
عكف: and those who seclude themselves for devotion and prayer
صفو: Then has your Lord chosen (for) you
كفي: So will suffice you against them
مري: Then will you dispute with him
حلل: and so that I make lawful
صوم: then he should fast in it
وقت: are gathered to their appointed time
جدل: so that they dispute with you
رجو: the one in whom hope was placed
عنت: surely He (could have) put you in difficulties
surely you would be in difficulty
طلق: And the women who are divorced
ورث: you have been made to inherit it
خطب: (is the) matter with both of you
ملأ: and surely you would have been filled
طمأن: and so that might be at rest
طير: We consider you a bad omen
قسط: you will be able to do justice
قنطر: with a great amount of wealth
أوب: to those who often turn (to Him)
نزع: and surely you would have disputed
صدر: of what is in the breasts
رجم: surely we would have stoned you
فشل: surely you would have lost courage
وكل: the ones who put trust (in Him)
سلط: surely He (would have) given them power
قسم: And he swore (to) both of them
دري: He (would) have made it known to you
صلب: and surely I will crucify you
and I will surely crucify you
حصن: And (prohibited are) the ones who are married
غسل: (is a spring of) water to bathe
فتل: (even as much as) a hair on a date-seed
(even as much as) a hair on a date seed
نقر: (even as much as the) speck on a date seed
(even as much as) the speck on a date-seed
بتك: so they will surely cut off
خنق: and that which is strangled (to death)
وقذ: and that which is hit fatally
ردي: and that which has a fatal fall
so that they may ruin them
نطح: and that which is gored by horns
كلب: ones who train animals to hunt
غرو: We will let you overpower them
صنع: and that you may be brought up
مكن: and that He will surely establish
وقف: they will be made to stand
طرد: So were you to send them away
ورق: with this silver coin of yours
خرق: he made a hole in it
Have you made a hole in it
قرف: and so that they may commit
دلل: So he made both of them fall
طلب: and the one who is sought
نزغ: an evil suggestion comes to you
ثبط: so He made them lag behind
قبر: and provides a grave for him
لزم: should We compel you (to accept) it
ترف: while We had given them luxury
وعي: and would be conscious of it
فند: you think me weakened in mind
صرخ: cried out to him for help
(would be) a responder to a cry
حصي: you will (be able to) count them
قنع: the needy who do not ask
خسف: Then We caused to swallow up
He would have caused it to swallow us
عتب: will be asked to make amends
will be allowed to make amends
شوي: of the skin of the head
فهم: And We gave understanding of it
وكز: so Musa struck him with his fist
قطمر: (as much as) the membrane of a date-seed
